productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Max Lte White Blue Shoe
description: The Air Max LTE blends a classic nike running shoe look with a simplistic design and maximum cushioning for the ultimate in comfort and style - ideal for neutral runners. Upper Breathable mesh and synthetic overlays offer lightweight  for lightweight durability Full inner sleeve construction adds seamless comfort Central lacing for customised Fit Heavily padded mesh tongue with mesh collar provides snug fit Midsole Full Phylon midsole for superior underfoot cushioning, offering a smooth ride Soft, cushy footbed for extra cushioning below the feet Outsole BRS 1000 carbon rubber under the heel Solid rubber covers the rest of the outsole to give durable traction Flex grooves encourage a smooth transition Visible Max Air unit in the heel provides maximum cushioning PU heel casing delivers durable support Flex grooves encourage a smooth transition shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
